About Me

Hello, I’m Andy 👋

I am a Cybersecurity Specialist based in Airdrie, Alberta, dedicated to building resilient systems and automating the complex. My approach to security combines deep technical curiosity with a focus on practical, real-world defense.

🛡 Technical Expertise

I am a lifelong learner, constantly pushing my boundaries to stay ahead of the evolving threat landscape.

  • Global Ranking: Currently ranked in the Top 1% globally on TryHackMe, where I sharpen my skills in penetration testing and offensive security.
  • Core Interests: Red Teaming, CTF challenges, and system hardening.
  • Cloud & Infrastructure: Experienced in managing and securing environments across Azure and AWS.

📜 Certifications

I hold a comprehensive suite of industry-standard certifications:

  • CompTIA: Pentest+, Cloud+, Security+, Network+, A+
  • Microsoft: AZ-104 (Azure Administrator), SC-900 (Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals)
  • AWS: Certified Cloud Practitioner

🤖 Personal Projects & The Home Lab

When I’m not auditing logs or testing vulnerabilities, I’m usually tinkering in my home lab. I have a strong interest in:

  • AI Automation: Developing and configuring local AI frameworks like Moltbot/OpenClaw to streamline daily workflows and enhance productivity.
  • Self-Hosting: Managing private, local infrastructure and exploring the boundaries of privacy-centric self-hosted services.

📬 Let’s Connect

I’m always open to discussing new technologies, security trends, or automation projects.

  • Email: me@andycyber.ca
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/sinocikid
  • X (Twitter): @andycyberlife

Feel free to reach out—let’s build something secure!
